tools.name: search_rackets
tools.description: Search published rackets using literal, case-insensitive catalogue filters.

tools.name: get_racket
tools.description: Get one published racket by its validated catalogue slug.

tools.name: compare_rackets
tools.description: Compare two to four distinct published racket slugs.

tools.name: list_racket_brands
tools.description: List brand variants grouped by case-insensitive normalized spelling.
